summary: SINGLE_FOCUS change of basis. NumberPlane with fixed YELLOW v=(3, 2) world position. ValueTracker s_tr morphs basis from standard to b_1=(2, 1), b_2=(-1, 1) with always_redraw GREEN/ORANGE basis arrows + tilted coordinate grid. Live [v]_B = P^{-1} v solved via numpy.linalg. Vector's world position invariant; coordinates change.
